nasb.text: The angel of the Lord said to Manoah, “Though you detain me, I will not eat your food, but if you prepare a burnt offering, then offer it to the Lord.” For Manoah did not know that he was the angel of the Lord.

esv.text: And the angel of the Lord said to Manoah, “If you detain me, I will not eat of your food. But if you prepare a burnt offering, then offer it to the Lord.” (For Manoah did not know that he was the angel of the Lord.)

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者對瑪挪亞說：“你雖然要我留下，我卻不吃你的食物；如果你預備燔祭，就當獻給耶和華。”原來瑪挪亞還不知道他是耶和華的使者。

ccb.text: 当时，玛挪亚仍然不知道那人是耶和华的天使。天使说：“我就是留下来也不会吃你预备的食物。如果你预备燔祭，就把它献给耶和华吧！”
